response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of experience, solid craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open source authorship) and entrepreneurial initiative as a platform founder. However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows only brief, recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) with no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of engineering leadership or strategic advisory work at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform used in production by an NGO network
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, low-latency systems, open-source libraries, and community teaching/workshops
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML depth — only recent, briefly described AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
No evidence of director-level scope: career is senior/staff IC delivery roles, not org-wide technical strategy or influence
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no recognized AI products, publications, or platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and AI-built products
Gap between senior IC delivery experience and director-level strategy scope
Exceeds 15-year experience minimum with entrepreneurial/founder experience
